rationale: Educ. Code §21.211 governs termination or suspension of teacher term contracts for good cause or financial exigency. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 21.211. TERMINATION OR SUSPENSION. (a) The board of trustees may terminate a term contract and discharge a teacher at any time for:
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns educator employment contracts and has no operative connection to homestead exemption levels.
